meaning: adj.卵形的,椭圆的n.卵形,椭圆形
examples: Did you choose an oval shape?
It is more of an oval, it is elliptical.
Eggs have an oval shape appealing to artists.
This is now my fifth time to welcome the Taoiseach to the Oval Office.
There they got the ultimate hands-on experience of enjoying a lap around the oval.
